title: SynDX: Synthetic Validation and Explainability Evidence for Dizziness-Focused Clinical Decision Support
description: A synthetic-data validation and explainability evidence package for dizziness-focused clinical decision support. It builds seeded synthetic vestibular cohorts, evaluates statistical realism and downstream diagnostic behavior, computes SHAP, NMF, and counterfactual explainability evidence, and exports curated validation figures. A deterministic seed-42 driver (scripts/run_all.py) regenerates every reported metric to committed result files.
